sentences.target: Ich will mein Kind gut erziehen.

translations.de: Ich will mein Kind gut erziehen.
translations.en: I want to raise my child well.
translations.es: Quiero criar bien a mi hijo.
translations.fr: Je veux bien élever mon enfant.
translations.ko: 나는 내 아이를 잘 키우고 싶어요.
translations.yue: 我想好好教養我個小朋友。
translations.ru: Я хочу хорошо воспитать своего ребёнка.
translations.he: אני רוצה לגדל את הילד שלי כמו שצריך.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn nuôi dạy con thật tốt.
translations.nl: Ik wil mijn kind goed opvoeden.
translations.uk: Я хочу добре виховати свою дитину.
translations.hi: मैं अपने बच्चे को अच्छी तरह पालना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να μεγαλώσω σωστά το παιδί μου.
translations.nb: Jeg vil oppdra barnet mitt godt.
translations.id: Saya ingin membesarkan anak saya dengan baik.
translations.sv: Jag vill uppfostra mitt barn på ett bra sätt.
translations.da: Jeg vil opdrage mit barn godt.
translations.ja: 自分の子どもをちゃんと育てたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular in nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary expressing intention; selects an infinitive verb complement.
Possessive determiner modifying the noun; here marking the possessed object.
Common noun; direct object of the verb phrase.
Adverb of manner modifying the action of the infinitive verb.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Wir versuchen unsere Kinder gemeinsam zu erziehen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈzuːxən ˈʊnzərə ˈkɪndɐ ɡəˈmaɪ̯nzaːm tsuː ɛɐ̯ˈtsiːən/

translations.de: Wir versuchen unsere Kinder gemeinsam zu erziehen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈzuːxən ˈʊnzərə ˈkɪndɐ ɡəˈmaɪ̯nzaːm tsuː ɛɐ̯ˈtsiːən/
translations.en: We try to raise our children together.
translations.es: Intentamos criar a nuestros hijos juntos.
translations.fr: Nous essayons d’élever nos enfants ensemble.
translations.it: Cerchiamo di crescere i nostri figli insieme.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们努力一起养育孩子。
translations.yue: 我哋嘗試一齊教養我哋嘅小朋友。
translations.ru: Мы стараемся воспитывать наших детей вместе.
translations.pt: Nós tentamos criar nossos filhos juntos.
translations.he: אנחנו מנסים לגדל את הילדים שלנו ביחד.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cố gắng cùng nhau nuôi dạy các con.
translations.nl: We proberen onze kinderen samen op te voeden.
translations.uk: Ми намагаємося виховувати наших дітей разом.
translations.hi: हम अपने बच्चों को मिलकर पालने की कोशिश करते हैं.
translations.pl: Staramy się wspólnie wychowywać nasze dzieci.
translations.el: Προσπαθούμε να μεγαλώσουμε τα παιδιά μας μαζί.
translations.nb: Vi prøver å oppdra barna våre sammen.
translations.id: Kami berusaha membesarkan anak-anak kami bersama.
translations.sv: Vi försöker uppfostra våra barn tillsammans.
translations.ro: Încercăm să ne creștem copiii împreună.
translations.cs: Snažíme se společně vychovávat naše děti.
translations.da: Vi prøver at opdrage vores børn sammen.
translations.ja: 私たちは一緒に子どもたちを育てようとしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb meaning ‘to try’; takes a zu-infinitive complement.
Possessive determiner modifying ‘Kinder’; agrees with plural noun (accusative within the infinitival VP).
Common noun, plural; semantic object of the infinitive verb.
Adverb modifying the manner of the action (‘together’).
Infinitival particle introducing the non-finite verb.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of ‘versuchen’ with ‘zu’.

translations.en: You have to raise children patiently.
translations.es: Hay que criar a los niños con paciencia.
translations.fr: Il faut élever les enfants avec patience.
translations.it: Bisogna crescere i bambini con pazienza.
translations.pt: É preciso criar as crianças com paciência.
translations.vi: Cần kiên nhẫn khi nuôi dạy trẻ.
translations.hi: बच्चों को धैर्य से पालना चाहिए.
translations.el: Πρέπει να μεγαλώνουμε τα παιδιά με υπομονή.
translations.ja: 子どもは根気よく育てないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal pronoun used as a generic subject.
Modal auxiliary expressing obligation; selects an infinitive complement.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the infinitive verb.
Adverb of manner modifying the infinitive verb.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Sie möchte den Hund richtig erziehen.

translations.de: Sie möchte den Hund richtig erziehen.
translations.en: She wants to train the dog properly.
translations.es: Ella quiere entrenar bien al perro.
translations.fr: Elle veut bien dresser le chien.
translations.it: Lei vuole addestrare bene il cane.
translations.pt: Ela quer treinar o cachorro direito.
translations.he: היא רוצה לאמן את הכלב כמו שצריך.
translations.vi: Cô ấy muốn huấn luyện con chó đúng cách.
translations.ar: هي تريد تدريب الكلب بشكل صحيح.
translations.nl: Ze wil de hond goed trainen.
translations.hi: वह कुत्ते को ठीक से प्रशिक्षित करना चाहती है.
translations.el: Θέλει να εκπαιδεύσει σωστά τον σκύλο.
translations.id: Dia ingin melatih anjingnya dengan benar.
translations.ro: Ea vrea să dreseze câinele corect.
translations.ja: 彼女は犬をちゃんとしつけたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine in nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II form) expressing desire; selects an infinitive complement.
Definite article, accusative masculine; determiner for ‘Hund’.
Common noun; direct object of the infinitive verb.
Adverb of manner modifying the infinitive verb.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal auxiliary.

jp: Ich will mein Kind gut erziehen.
Wir versuchen unsere Kinder gemeinsam zu erziehen.
Sie möchte den Hund richtig erziehen.
fu: /viːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈzuːxən ˈʊnzərə ˈkɪndɐ ɡəˈmaɪ̯nzaːm tsuː ɛɐ̯ˈtsiːən/
de: Ich will mein Kind gut erziehen.
Wir versuchen unsere Kinder gemeinsam zu erziehen.
Sie möchte den Hund richtig erziehen.
ipa: /viːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈzuːxən ˈʊnzərə ˈkɪndɐ ɡəˈmaɪ̯nzaːm tsuː ɛɐ̯ˈtsiːən/
en: I want to raise my child well.
We try to raise our children together.
You have to raise children patiently.
She wants to train the dog properly.
